headline: A Look At Expeditors International Of Washington (EXPD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Recent performance and business profile Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) has drawn investor interest after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 1% on the day but up around 6% over the past month. The company operates a global logistics network covering the Americas, Europe, North Asia, South Asia, Latin America, Other North America, and the Middle East, Africa and India, with total revenue of US$11.19b and net income of US$836.15m. headline: United Airlines Adds First U.S.-Sapporo Nonstop, Boosts Japan Service
summary: UAL expands Japan network with new nonstop Sapporo and Tokyo-Narita routes, boosting premium transpacific travel access.
